free_text: New data on cross-sections of deuteron induced nuclear
reactions on gold up to 50 MeV and comparison of
production routes of medically relevant Au and Hg
Natural gold foil, thickness: 25 microns as backing of
One stack containing 22 Ga-Ni targets on Au backing
interleaved with Al (98 um and 49.6 um) and
Ni (23.9 um) monitor/degrader foils. The stack was
irradiated in Faraday cup like target holder.
The beam current was kept constant, 100 nA (+/-5%).
